summary.en: Revenue intelligence platform built for startups.
summary.zh: 為新創公司打造的營收智慧平台。

highlight.en: Set up in minutes, Lysto drives revenue growth with automatic insights and intelligent answers, aiming to cut out manual busy work.
highlight.zh: Lysto 幾分鐘即可設定完成，透過自動洞察與智慧解答推動營收成長，目標是省去人工繁瑣作業。

summary.en: Turns your data into actionable insights in seconds.
summary.zh: 在數秒內將你的資料轉化為可行動的洞察。

highlight.en: Vizly's AI auto-generates interactive visualizations, runs statistical analyses, and offers predictive insights for researchers, analysts, and business leaders.
highlight.zh: Vizly 的 AI 能自動產生互動式視覺化圖表、執行統計分析並提供預測洞察，服務研究人員、分析師與企業決策者。

summary.en: Helps families get paid for providing caregiving at home.
summary.zh: 協助家庭因在家照護而獲得報酬。

highlight.en: CareOasis focuses on family caregiving, creating a path for relatives to receive compensation for the care they already provide.
highlight.zh: CareOasis 聚焦家庭照護，為親屬已提供的照護工作開闢一條獲得報酬的途徑。

summary.en: Simpler, cheaper multi-cloud and cross-platform deployments.
summary.zh: 更簡單、更便宜的多雲與跨平台部署。

highlight.en: Apoxy is a programmable edge platform pairing secure site-to-site networking with a runtime for custom TypeScript and Go filters, from Kubernetes clusters to simple processes.
highlight.zh: Apoxy 是可程式化的邊緣平台，將安全的站對站網路與可執行自訂 TypeScript 和 Go 過濾器的執行環境結合，涵蓋從 Kubernetes 叢集到簡單行程的場景。

summary.en: Digital banking platform for the 30 million smartphone users in the DRC.
summary.zh: 為剛果民主共和國 3,000 萬智慧型手機用戶打造的數位銀行平台。

highlight.en: VaultPay lets Congolese entrepreneurs open personal and business accounts and receive payments from their phones, tapping the country's largest agent network instead of bank branches.
highlight.zh: VaultPay 讓剛果創業者直接用手機開立個人與企業帳戶並收款，透過全國最大的代理商網路取代到銀行分行排隊。

summary.en: An applied AI company building useful software for humans.
summary.zh: 一家為人類打造實用軟體的應用 AI 公司。

highlight.en: Khoj is a tiny team of hackers doing applied research and building safe, useful AI software for everyday human use.
highlight.zh: Khoj 是一支小型駭客團隊，從事應用研究並打造安全、實用、貼近日常使用的 AI 軟體。

summary.en: Recovers failed payments to maximize subscription revenue.
summary.zh: 挽回失敗付款，將訂閱營收最大化。

highlight.en: Slicker's AI-powered retry engine monitors, detects, and recovers failed recurring payments, converting past-due invoices into revenue and cutting involuntary churn.
highlight.zh: Slicker 以 AI 驅動的重試引擎監控、偵測並挽回失敗的週期性付款，將逾期帳單轉為營收，並減少非自願流失。

summary.en: Speeds up materials innovation with artificial intelligence.
summary.zh: 以人工智慧加速材料創新。

highlight.en: Osium AI helps R&D engineers design new materials faster, replacing slow trial-and-error as manufacturers seek greener, lighter materials for decarbonization.
highlight.zh: Osium AI 協助研發工程師更快設計新材料，取代緩慢的反覆試錯，因應製造商為脫碳而尋求更綠色、更輕量材料的需求。

summary.en: Automatic AI timekeeping for legal professionals.
summary.zh: 為法律專業人士提供的自動 AI 計時工具。

highlight.en: Inlet records attorneys' billable tasks automatically as they context-switch across matters, eliminating admin time and capturing time that often goes unrecorded.
highlight.zh: Inlet 在律師於多個案件間切換時自動記錄可計費任務，省去行政時間並補捉過往常被遺漏的工時。

summary.en: Development platform that makes it 10x easier to improve visual AI models.
summary.zh: 讓改善視覺 AI 模型容易 10 倍的開發平台。

highlight.en: Vango is a flexible evaluation platform that gives developers quantitative ways to improve visual AI models like Stable Diffusion, saving them around 10 hours per week.
highlight.zh: Vango 是彈性的評估平台，為開發者提供量化方式來改善如 Stable Diffusion 等視覺 AI 模型，每週約可節省 10 小時。

summary.en: Observability and evaluation platform for LLM apps.
summary.zh: 為 LLM 應用打造的可觀測性與評估平台。

highlight.en: Baserun helps AI teams streamline the cycle from identifying an issue to evaluating a fix, tackling the latency, cost, and unpredictable outputs that complicate productionizing LLMs.
highlight.zh: Baserun 協助 AI 團隊簡化從發現問題到評估解法的流程，因應 LLM 上線時的延遲、成本與輸出不可預測等難題。

summary.en: A budgeting app with built-in checking and debit cards.
summary.zh: 內建支票帳戶與簽帳金融卡的記帳預算應用。

highlight.en: Envelope lets people organize real money into digital envelopes and plan for bills and spending, controlling money before it's spent rather than only tracking transactions afterward.
highlight.zh: Envelope 讓使用者把真實金錢分配到數位信封中，預先規劃帳單與支出，在花錢之前就先掌控，而非事後才記帳。

summary.en: Automates chargebacks with AI agents.
summary.zh: 以 AI 代理自動處理拒付爭議。

highlight.en: DisputeNinja helps software and AI startups automate chargeback handling and recover revenue that would otherwise be lost to disputes.
highlight.zh: DisputeNinja 協助軟體與 AI 新創自動化拒付處理，挽回原本會因爭議而流失的營收。

summary.en: Dead-simple testing and iteration for LLMs.
summary.zh: 極簡的 LLM 測試與迭代工具。

highlight.en: Chatter is Postman for LLMs: iterate on prompts, run them across model families, and evaluate against test cases in one place, with collaboration for engineers and QA.
highlight.zh: Chatter 是 LLM 版的 Postman：在同一處迭代提示詞、跨不同模型家族執行並針對測試案例評估，並提供工程師與 QA 協作功能。

summary.en: Your junior AI product manager.
summary.zh: 你的 AI 初階產品經理。

highlight.en: Inari mines customer feedback, CRM, and backlog to surface insights and product opportunities, then links them to your tools so teams analyze less and build more.
highlight.zh: Inari 從客戶回饋、CRM 與待辦清單中挖掘洞察與產品機會，並串接你的工具，讓團隊少做分析、多做產品。

summary.en: Orchestrate your coding agents with sudocode.
summary.zh: 用 sudocode 協調你的程式設計代理。

highlight.en: Fully open-source, sudocode automates managing context windows and orchestrating coding agents so you direct the work instead of babysitting agents.
highlight.zh: sudocode 完全開源，自動化管理上下文視窗並協調程式設計代理，讓你指揮工作而非時時盯著代理。

summary.en: Turns manual operations into scalable processes.
summary.zh: 將人工作業轉化為可擴展的流程。

highlight.en: Built on the premise that AI needs humans in the loop, Fragment starts with task management for fintech operations teams, then adds a layer of human supervision to scale automation.
highlight.zh: Fragment 立基於「AI 需要人類參與其中」的前提，先為金融科技營運團隊提供任務管理，再加上一層人工監督來擴大自動化。

summary.en: Machine learning to predict and prevent pregnancy complications.
summary.zh: 以機器學習預測並預防孕期併發症。

highlight.en: Elythea's ML models flag life-threatening obstetric risks from the first visit, with global studies showing 3x more complications caught 10x sooner than clinical judgment.
highlight.zh: Elythea 的機器學習模型自首次就診起即標記危及生命的產科風險，全球研究顯示其偵測併發症較臨床判斷多 3 倍、且早 10 倍。

summary.en: A marketplace to book doctors and avoid surprise medical bills.
summary.zh: 可預約醫師並避免意外帳單的醫療市集。

highlight.en: Patients enter insurance and visit reason, and Certainly Health uses machine learning to predict and guarantee out-of-pocket costs while ensuring providers always get paid.
highlight.zh: 病患輸入保險與就診原因後，Certainly Health 以機器學習預測並保證自付費用，同時確保醫療院所一定收得到款。

summary.en: The open-source Postman alternative.
summary.zh: 開源的 Postman 替代方案。

highlight.en: RecipeUI began as a viral internal project at Robinhood that hit 100% adoption, letting anyone from frontend to QA to PMs debug a broken API without backend engineers.
highlight.zh: RecipeUI 起源於 Robinhood 內部爆紅、達到 100% 採用率的專案，讓從前端到 QA 再到產品經理的任何人都能在 API 故障時自行除錯，無需後端工程師。

summary.en: Cursor for AI agents.
summary.zh: AI 代理界的 Cursor。

highlight.en: Minded lets users generate AI agents in plain English, edit visually, and customize with code, already automating millions of tasks across support, sales, and finance for firms like eToro and Payoneer.
highlight.zh: Minded 讓使用者用白話文生成 AI 代理、以視覺化方式編輯並用程式碼客製，已為 eToro、Payoneer 等公司在客服、銷售與財務領域自動化數百萬項任務。

summary.en: Long-horizon AI research agents.
summary.zh: 長時程 AI 研究代理。

highlight.en: Webhound builds research agents that scale quality with time and budget, producing either structured datasets or fully cited research reports.
highlight.zh: Webhound 打造的研究代理能隨投入時間與預算提升品質，產出結構化資料集或附完整引用的研究報告。

summary.en: A flight search engine for credit card points and miles.
summary.zh: 專為信用卡點數與哩程打造的航班搜尋引擎。

highlight.en: Roame sits at the intersection of travel tech and fintech, helping travelers redeem points for dream trips in seconds rather than days.
highlight.zh: Roame 位於旅遊科技與金融科技的交會點，協助旅客在數秒內、而非數天內把點數兌換成理想行程。

summary.en: The patient engagement software that pays you back.
summary.zh: 會回饋收入給你的病患互動軟體。

highlight.en: Kips Health lets physical therapists automatically collect remote therapeutic monitoring (RTM) reimbursements with only five minutes of work.
highlight.zh: Kips Health 讓物理治療師僅需五分鐘作業，即可自動收取遠端治療監測（RTM）的保險給付。

summary.en: Build chat-with-data agents for customer-facing apps.
summary.zh: 為面向客戶的應用打造可對話查詢資料的代理。

highlight.en: Inconvo is an open-source platform for building data agents on production databases, offering safe query execution, permissions, stateful conversations, and observability out of the box.
highlight.zh: Inconvo 是開源平台，可在正式環境資料庫上建構資料代理，內建安全查詢執行、權限管理、有狀態對話與可觀測性。

summary.en: A compliance training platform built for regulated industries.
summary.zh: 專為受監管產業打造的法遵訓練平台。

highlight.en: Affinity's founders previously built a fintech from inception to a successful exit, now applying that experience to serve regulated tech firms from growth stage to large enterprise banks.
highlight.zh: Affinity 的創辦人曾將一家金融科技公司從零打造到成功出場，如今運用該經驗服務從成長期到大型企業銀行的受監管科技公司。

summary.en: AI agents reliable enough to do real work.
summary.zh: 可靠到足以勝任真正工作的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Autotab is a drop-in AI knowledge worker that uses a mouse and keyboard like a human, handling tasks thousands of steps long across systems like Salesforce, HubSpot, and Jira.
highlight.zh: Autotab 是可即插即用的 AI 知識工作者，像人類一樣使用滑鼠與鍵盤，能在 Salesforce、HubSpot、Jira 等系統間處理長達數千步驟的任務。

summary.en: AI for legal and government work.
summary.zh: 為法律與政府領域打造的 AI。

highlight.en: Cembla applies AI to the specialized needs of the legal and government sectors.
highlight.zh: Cembla 將 AI 應用於法律與政府部門的專業需求。

summary.en: An AI-native customer support platform.
summary.zh: AI 原生的客戶支援平台。

highlight.en: Letterbook is an AI-native alternative to Zendesk and Intercom whose AI triages tickets across email, in-app, and forms, writes replies, and builds your knowledge base.
highlight.zh: Letterbook 是 Zendesk 與 Intercom 的 AI 原生替代方案，其 AI 能跨電子郵件、應用內與表單分類工單、撰寫回覆並建立知識庫。

summary.en: Turn expensive prompts into cheap fine-tuned models.
summary.zh: 把昂貴的提示詞轉化為便宜的微調模型。

highlight.en: OpenPipe captures your provider's prompt-completion pairs in the background and uses them to create a new model that is faster, cheaper, and often more accurate than the original.
highlight.zh: OpenPipe 在背景擷取你現有供應商的提示詞與回應配對，並用來打造一個比原本更快、更便宜、且往往更準確的新模型。

summary.en: The simplest way to extract web data at scale.
summary.zh: 大規模擷取網頁資料的最簡方式。

highlight.en: Reworkd's multimodal LLM agents traverse hundreds to thousands of sites against a customer's data schema, understand their structure, and generate code to extract data.
highlight.zh: Reworkd 的多模態 LLM 代理依客戶的資料結構走訪數百至數千個網站，理解其結構並產生擷取資料的程式碼。

summary.en: Embed charts, dashboards, and exports inside your app.
summary.zh: 在你的應用中嵌入圖表、儀表板與匯出功能。

highlight.en: DataShare is a data-as-a-service platform backed by an enterprise data warehouse that embeds full dashboards and downloadable statements in fewer than 20 lines of code.
highlight.zh: DataShare 是以企業級資料倉儲為後盾的資料即服務平台，可用不到 20 行程式碼嵌入完整儀表板與可下載的報表。

summary.en: Turn product features into launch videos.
summary.zh: 把產品功能變成上線發表影片。

highlight.en: Midrender is an AI-powered motion-graphics editor: point the agent at your codebase and it reads the code, understands the feature, and creates an animated walkthrough you can ship.
highlight.zh: Midrender 是以 AI 驅動的動態圖形編輯器：將代理指向你的程式碼庫，它便讀取程式碼、理解功能並製作可直接發布的動畫導覽。

summary.en: Low-false-positive intrusion detection for remote outdoor sites.
summary.zh: 為偏遠戶外場域提供低誤報的入侵偵測。

highlight.en: Rimward turns existing CCTV at solar farms and remote infrastructure into operator-ready alerts with video verification, cutting false alarms without heavy hardware retrofits.
highlight.zh: Rimward 將太陽能廠與偏遠基礎設施的既有監視器轉化為附影像驗證、可供操作員行動的警報，減少誤報且無需大規模硬體改裝。

summary.en: Root-cause help for chronic conditions.
summary.zh: 為慢性病提供根因層面的協助。

highlight.en: Saatvy is a natural wellness platform for chronic conditions like gut, sleep, and thyroid disorders, with personalized plans from experienced Ayurveda practitioners focused on root causes.
highlight.zh: Saatvy 是針對腸道、睡眠、甲狀腺等慢性病的天然健康平台，由經驗豐富的阿育吠陀醫師量身打造著重根本原因的健康計畫。

summary.en: Specialized AI agents for real work.
summary.zh: 為真正工作打造的專門 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Opensteer runs specialized AI agents in cloud computers with customizable browser access, tools, instructions, and guardrails, so each works 24/7 the way you need.
highlight.zh: Opensteer 在雲端電腦中執行專門的 AI 代理，提供可客製的瀏覽器存取、工具、指令與護欄，讓每個代理依你的需求全天候運作。

summary.en: An AI SRE for teams running on Kubernetes.
summary.zh: 為使用 Kubernetes 的團隊打造的 AI 網站可靠性工程師。

highlight.en: Run one command and Metoro delivers autonomous root-causing and automatic fix PRs, setting up telemetry automatically to go from nothing to production-ready in under five minutes.
highlight.zh: 只需執行一個指令，Metoro 即提供自主根因分析與自動修復 PR，並自動設定遙測，讓你在五分鐘內從零達到可上線狀態。

summary.en: An asset-light Chipotle for Africa.
summary.zh: 非洲版的輕資產 Chipotle。

highlight.en: Chow Central's delivery-only '500chow' restaurants run hyper-locally within a 3km radius, claiming 10x lower costs and 10x more online orders than brick-and-mortar.
highlight.zh: Chow Central 的純外送餐廳「500chow」在 3 公里範圍內超在地化營運，宣稱成本較實體店低 10 倍、線上訂單多 10 倍。

summary.en: A pioneering open-source coding agent.
summary.zh: 開創性的開源程式設計代理。

highlight.en: Continue built a pioneering open-source coding agent and was acquired by Cursor.
highlight.zh: Continue 打造了開創性的開源程式設計代理，並被 Cursor 收購。

summary.en: Intelligent meeting automation for ambitious teams.
summary.zh: 為企圖心強的團隊打造的智慧會議自動化。

highlight.en: Onward is a take on conversational intelligence that streamlines follow-ups, CRM updates, and ticket creation after every meeting, connecting that knowledge to your other tools.
highlight.zh: Onward 是對話智慧的新詮釋，在每場會議後簡化後續追蹤、CRM 更新與工單建立，並將這些知識串接到你的其他工具。

summary.en: Automating FDA-grade traceability requirements with sensors and AI.
summary.zh: 以感測器與 AI 自動化符合 FDA 等級的可追溯性要求。

highlight.en: Cognitio Labs builds real-time compliance infrastructure for regulated supply chains as the FDA's FSMA 204 rule will require 24-hour digital traceability records across 60,000+ food facilities by 2028.
highlight.zh: Cognitio Labs 為受監管供應鏈打造即時法遵基礎設施，因應 FDA 的 FSMA 204 規範要求逾 6 萬家食品設施在 2028 年前須於 24 小時內提供數位可追溯紀錄。

summary.en: An AI workspace for financial services.
summary.zh: 為金融服務業打造的 AI 工作空間。

highlight.en: Model ML is built by repeat founders behind Fat Llama (acquired by Hygglo) and Fancy (acquired by Gopuff), covering business, sales, tech, and product.
highlight.zh: Model ML 由連續創業者打造，他們曾創辦 Fat Llama（被 Hygglo 收購）與 Fancy（被 Gopuff 收購），分別負責業務、銷售、技術與產品。

summary.en: Supersonics for the new Jet Age.
summary.zh: 為新噴射時代打造的超音速飛行。

highlight.en: Astro Mechanica's electric combined-cycle engine, Duality, is the first jet engine engineered for efficiency from takeoff to Mach 3+, enabling affordable point-to-point global travel.
highlight.zh: Astro Mechanica 的電動複合循環引擎 Duality 是首具從起飛到 3 馬赫以上皆兼顧效率的噴射引擎，可實現可負擔的點對點全球旅行。

summary.en: AI phone agents to supercharge contact center operations.
summary.zh: 以 AI 電話代理強化客服中心營運。

highlight.en: Retell AI is a leading platform for building and managing AI voice agents that transform how contact centers operate.
highlight.zh: Retell AI 是建構與管理 AI 語音代理的領先平台，徹底改變客服中心的營運方式。

summary.en: A no-code platform for building AI agents and automating workflows.
summary.zh: 用於建構 AI 代理與自動化工作流程的無程式碼平台。

highlight.en: Gumloop lets builders drag, drop, and connect modular components on a canvas to automate complex workflows end-to-end at 10x the speed of writing and productionizing code.
highlight.zh: Gumloop 讓建構者在畫布上拖放並串連模組化元件，端對端自動化複雜工作流程，速度是撰寫並上線程式碼的 10 倍。

summary.en: AI employees called Artisans, starting with an AI BDR.
summary.zh: 名為 Artisans 的 AI 員工，從 AI 業務開發代表起步。

highlight.en: Artisan's first AI employee, Ava, autonomously finds and researches leads, writes on-brand emails, and runs outbound sequences; the company reports $6M+ ARR and hundreds of customers.
highlight.zh: Artisan 的首位 AI 員工 Ava 能自主尋找並研究潛在客戶、撰寫符合品牌語氣的郵件並執行外撥序列；公司表示已達 600 萬美元以上 ARR 與數百家客戶。

summary.en: An AI workforce for the insurance industry.
summary.zh: 為保險業打造的 AI 勞動力。

highlight.en: FurtherAI's domain-specific assistant automates submission intake, policy comparisons, and underwriting audits, supporting customers writing over $15B in premiums across all 50 states.
highlight.zh: FurtherAI 的領域專屬助理自動化投保收件、保單比較與核保稽核，服務於全美 50 州承保保費逾 150 億美元的客戶。

summary.en: Accelerate medication access with AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 加速病患取得藥物。

highlight.en: Trellis AI applies artificial intelligence to speed up how patients gain access to medications.
highlight.zh: Trellis AI 運用人工智慧加速病患取得藥物的流程。

summary.en: Real-time, two-way sync between CRMs and databases.
summary.zh: 在 CRM 與資料庫之間即時雙向同步。

highlight.en: Stacksync keeps CRMs like Salesforce and databases like Postgres in instant bidirectional sync via no-code setup, claiming a 90% improvement on integration delivery time and budget.
highlight.zh: Stacksync 透過無程式碼設定讓 Salesforce 等 CRM 與 Postgres 等資料庫即時雙向同步，宣稱整合的交付時間與預算改善達 90%。

summary.en: The complete agentic document platform.
summary.zh: 完整的代理式文件處理平台。

highlight.en: Reducto combines in-house and frontier models to power accurate document workflows for AI teams at Harvey, Scale AI, and Vanta, with cloud to fully air-gapped deployment and SOC 2/HIPAA compliance.
highlight.zh: Reducto 結合自研與前沿模型，為 Harvey、Scale AI、Vanta 等 AI 團隊提供精準的文件工作流程，支援從雲端到完全離線的部署並符合 SOC 2 與 HIPAA。

summary.en: Your AI recruiter for interviewing and identifying top talent.
summary.zh: 你的 AI 招募官，負責面試並找出頂尖人才。

highlight.en: Alex conducts live video interviews, asking personalized real-time follow-ups, and has already run thousands of interviews across engineering, IT, retail, and hospitality.
highlight.zh: Alex 透過即時視訊進行面試，依應徵者回答即時提出個人化追問，已在工程、IT、零售與餐旅等領域進行數千場面試。

summary.en: A USD banking platform for Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲打造的美元銀行平台。

highlight.en: Cleva lets African freelancers and businesses receive USD payments worldwide, spend via card, pay bills, and save in dollars to hedge against local currency volatility.
highlight.zh: Cleva 讓非洲自由工作者與企業在全球收取美元款項、以卡片消費、繳費，並以美元儲蓄來對沖當地貨幣波動。

summary.en: A mobile carrier for businesses in Brazil.
summary.zh: 為巴西企業打造的行動電信業者。

highlight.en: Over 1,800 companies use Salvy to manage 20,000+ mobile lines and cut costs by over 50%, with a software layer integrated with HRIS and ERP systems in a $5B market.
highlight.zh: 逾 1,800 家公司使用 Salvy 管理超過 2 萬條行動門號並省下逾 50% 成本，其軟體層整合 HRIS 與 ERP，所在市場規模達 50 億美元。

summary.en: A modern OS for the financial back office.
summary.zh: 為金融後台打造的現代作業系統。

highlight.en: Greenboard is an AI-powered platform that detects risk and replaces legacy compliance tooling, aiming to let financial institutions run back-office teams at half the headcount.
highlight.zh: Greenboard 是以 AI 驅動的平台，能偵測風險並取代老舊的法遵工具，目標是讓金融機構以一半人力營運後台團隊。

summary.en: A marketplace for America's most essential assets.
summary.zh: 美國最關鍵資產的交易市集。

highlight.en: Garage's AI-powered marketplace automates appraisals, payments, paperwork, freight, warranty, and financing for community vehicles and equipment, cutting transactions from months to minutes.
highlight.zh: Garage 以 AI 驅動的市集自動化社區車輛與設備交易中的估價、付款、文件、運輸、保固與融資，將原本數月的交易縮短為數分鐘。

summary.en: An autonomous offensive and defensive security platform.
summary.zh: 自主的攻防一體資安平台。

highlight.en: CodeAnt AI attacks systems like a real adversary, then walks back into the code to help build defenses exactly where the attack got through, billing only for high or critical findings.
highlight.zh: CodeAnt AI 像真正的攻擊者一樣攻擊系統，再回到程式碼中於攻擊突破之處精準建立防禦，且僅就高危或重大問題收費。

summary.en: Enterprise AI customer support.
summary.zh: 企業級 AI 客戶支援。

highlight.en: Open is an all-in-one AI support platform used in production by enterprises like Mollie and Viva, automating complex cases across email, web, phone, SMS, and WhatsApp.
highlight.zh: Open 是一體化的 AI 客服平台，已在 Mollie、Viva 等企業正式環境使用，跨電子郵件、網頁、電話、簡訊與 WhatsApp 自動化處理複雜案件。

summary.en: Open-source AI chat connected to your company's knowledge.
summary.zh: 連接公司知識的開源 AI 聊天工具。

highlight.en: Onyx ingests and syncs from sources like Google Drive, Slack, GitHub, and Salesforce so users can ask about anything, like having every knowledgeable co-worker available 24/7.
highlight.zh: Onyx 從 Google Drive、Slack、GitHub、Salesforce 等來源擷取並同步資料，讓使用者隨時提問，宛如把所有最懂的同事整合成一位、全天候待命。

summary.en: An AI code review agent with full context of your codebase.
summary.zh: 具備完整程式碼庫脈絡的 AI 程式碼審查代理。

highlight.en: Greptile reviews pull requests with full codebase context; users like PostHog and Raycast report catching more bugs and merging PRs 4x faster, with air-gapped VPC hosting available.
highlight.zh: Greptile 在審查 PR 時掌握完整程式碼庫脈絡；PostHog、Raycast 等用戶表示能抓到更多錯誤並讓 PR 合併速度快 4 倍，並支援離線 VPC 部署。

summary.en: An AI inference platform for drug discovery.
summary.zh: 為藥物探索打造的 AI 推論平台。

highlight.en: Tamarind Bio lets scientists run ML models like AlphaFold to design and simulate molecules through a simple interface, avoiding the need to set up HPC environments or handle DevOps.
highlight.zh: Tamarind Bio 讓科學家透過簡單介面執行 AlphaFold 等機器學習模型來設計與模擬分子，免去自行架設高效能運算環境或處理 DevOps 的麻煩。

summary.en: AI software for underserved industries, starting with automotive.
summary.zh: 為服務不足的產業打造的 AI 軟體，從汽車業起步。

highlight.en: Toma started as voice AI infrastructure and now powers AI receptionists for hundreds of auto businesses, working with names like Lithia Motors and backed by Andreessen Horowitz.
highlight.zh: Toma 起初為語音 AI 基礎設施，如今為數百家汽車業者提供 AI 接待員，並與 Lithia Motors 等業者合作，獲 Andreessen Horowitz 支持。

summary.en: Card issuer-processor and banking stack for Sub-Saharan businesses.
summary.zh: 為撒哈拉以南企業打造的發卡處理與銀行技術堆疊。

highlight.en: Miden helps Sub-Saharan businesses launch card programs and financial products, rising to a top-5 card-issuing fintech by transaction volume within eight months of launch.
highlight.zh: Miden 協助撒哈拉以南企業推出發卡計畫與金融產品，上線八個月內即躋身當地交易量前五大的發卡金融科技公司。

summary.en: An operating system for travel businesses in Africa with embedded finance.
summary.zh: 為非洲旅遊業者打造、內嵌金融的作業系統。

highlight.en: Formerly Tripitaca, Triply unifies payments, invoicing, payroll, accounting, and operations into one platform so African travel businesses can sell and operate more efficiently.
highlight.zh: Triply（前身為 Tripitaca）將付款、開立發票、薪資、會計與營運整合於單一平台，讓非洲旅遊業者更有效率地銷售與營運。

summary.en: An AI receptionist for dentists.
summary.zh: 為牙醫打造的 AI 接待員。

highlight.en: Arini manages calls, texts, and bookings for dental groups, tackling the 20-30% of inbound calls practices miss in a $220B industry that still runs on legacy systems.
highlight.zh: Arini 為牙科診所管理來電、簡訊與預約，解決診所漏接 20-30% 來電的問題，所處的 2,200 億美元產業仍仰賴老舊系統運作。

summary.en: A context layer for codebases.
summary.zh: 為程式碼庫打造的脈絡層。

highlight.en: Driver computes context ahead of time to deliver symbol-complete documentation, architecture maps, and history guides so teams and agents can reason across an entire codebase.
highlight.zh: Driver 預先運算脈絡，產出符號完整的文件、架構圖與歷史指南，讓團隊與代理能對整個程式碼庫進行推理。

summary.en: An open-source alternative to AWS.
summary.zh: AWS 的開源替代方案。

highlight.en: Ubicloud offers elastic compute, storage, networking, managed Postgres, K8s, and AI inference on bare-metal providers like Hetzner, claiming 3-10x lower cloud costs.
highlight.zh: Ubicloud 在 Hetzner 等裸機供應商上提供彈性運算、儲存、網路、託管 Postgres、K8s 與 AI 推論，宣稱可將雲端成本降低 3 至 10 倍。

summary.en: An agentic quality platform for web and mobile.
summary.zh: 為網頁與行動裝置打造的代理式品質平台。

highlight.en: Engineering teams write end-to-end tests in plain English and use Momentic's AI agents to triage failures and catch regressions; Notion, Quora, and Webflow are among 100+ users.
highlight.zh: 工程團隊以白話文撰寫端對端測試，並用 Momentic 的 AI 代理分類失敗並抓出迴歸問題；Notion、Quora、Webflow 皆在逾 100 個用戶之列。

summary.en: An AI time platform for law firms.
summary.zh: 為律師事務所打造的 AI 計時平台。

highlight.en: PointOne offers AI-native automated time entry, compliance, and analytics for law firms.
highlight.zh: PointOne 為律師事務所提供 AI 原生的自動計時、法遵與分析功能。

summary.en: Self-driving observability, evals, and gateway for AI agents.
summary.zh: 為 AI 代理打造的自動化可觀測性、評估與閘道。

highlight.en: Formerly Keywords AI, Respan connects observability, automated and human-in-the-loop evals, and an adaptive gateway; it processes 1B+ logs and 2T+ tokens monthly for 100+ teams.
highlight.zh: Respan（前身為 Keywords AI）整合可觀測性、自動與人為參與的評估，以及自適應閘道；每月處理逾 10 億筆日誌與 2 兆 token，服務逾 100 個團隊。

summary.en: Business banking for cross-border SMBs and startups.
summary.zh: 為跨境中小企業與新創打造的企業銀行服務。

highlight.en: Infinity helps cross-border businesses in India make payments 70% cheaper than traditional methods and earn income on idle cash by investing in government securities.
highlight.zh: Infinity 協助印度的跨境企業以較傳統方式便宜 70% 的成本付款，並透過投資政府公債讓閒置資金產生收益。

summary.en: AI agents for healthcare admin.
summary.zh: 為醫療行政打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Parallel's agents navigate legacy hospital software with mouse and keyboard like humans, automating end-to-end workflows starting with medical coding.
highlight.zh: Parallel 的代理像人類一樣以滑鼠與鍵盤操作老舊醫院軟體，端對端自動化各項工作流程，並從醫療編碼起步。

summary.en: The AI operating system for modern fleets.
summary.zh: 為現代車隊打造的 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: Carma's AI-native platform turns manual fleet operations into automated workflows, already powering some of the largest U.S. fleets including Fortune 500 clients, backed by a $5.5M seed.
highlight.zh: Carma 的 AI 原生平台把人工車隊作業轉為自動化流程，已支援美國一些最大型車隊（含財星 500 大客戶），並獲 550 萬美元種子輪資金。

summary.en: AI agents for hospitality.
summary.zh: 為餐旅業打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Conduit lets operators create, test, and run on-brand AI agents that handle the full guest journey and internal operations, trusted by 1,000+ hospitality brands across 120+ countries.
highlight.zh: Conduit 讓業者建立、測試並執行符合品牌調性的 AI 代理，涵蓋完整賓客旅程與內部營運，獲逾 120 國、逾 1,000 個餐旅品牌信賴。

summary.en: An AI-native investment bank for small businesses.
summary.zh: 為小型企業打造的 AI 原生投資銀行。

highlight.en: OffDeal automates the analyst grunt work of Wall Street banks so its in-house M&A advisors can focus on strategy, helping small business owners sell faster at premium prices.
highlight.zh: OffDeal 自動化華爾街銀行中分析師的繁瑣工作，讓其內部併購顧問能專注策略，協助小型企業主以更快速度、更高價格出售公司。

summary.en: Modern health insurance for dual-income families.
summary.zh: 為雙薪家庭打造的現代健康保險。

highlight.en: Healia lets companies cover the out-of-pocket costs of employees who enroll in a spouse's plan, saving roughly $10k per enrollee; it now serves 50+ customers with over 40k employees.
highlight.zh: Healia 讓企業為加入配偶保險方案的員工負擔自付額，每位加入者約省 1 萬美元；目前服務逾 50 家客戶、涵蓋逾 4 萬名員工。

summary.en: The AI communication layer for healthcare.
summary.zh: 為醫療打造的 AI 溝通層。

highlight.en: Clarion's AI agents handle scheduling, billing, and refill calls so clinics stop missing 30-40% of inbound calls; it serves tens of thousands of patients monthly, backed by $5.4M.
highlight.zh: Clarion 的 AI 代理處理排程、帳務與續藥來電，讓診所不再漏接 30-40% 的來電；每月服務數萬名病患，並獲 540 萬美元資金支持。

summary.en: Go from 3D models to CAD drawings using AI.
summary.zh: 用 AI 從 3D 模型生成 CAD 製造圖。

highlight.en: DraftAid bills itself as the world's first generative AI for CAD manufacturing drawings, akin to GitHub Copilot but for CAD, turning hours of manual drawing into seconds.
highlight.zh: DraftAid 自稱是全球首個用於 CAD 製造圖的生成式 AI，宛如 CAD 版的 GitHub Copilot，把數小時的手動製圖縮短為數秒。

summary.en: A data and AI transformation partner for PE-backed portfolio companies.
summary.zh: 為私募股權投資組合公司提供資料與 AI 轉型的合作夥伴。

highlight.en: ProSights serves as a data and AI transformation partner specifically to private-equity-backed portfolio companies.
highlight.zh: ProSights 專門為私募股權投資組合公司擔任資料與 AI 轉型的合作夥伴。

summary.en: An interactive email builder for ecommerce brands.
summary.zh: 為電商品牌打造的互動式郵件製作工具。

highlight.en: Leveraging changes that let a whole website embed inside an email, Zaymo is the first email builder letting Shopify brands create fully interactive emails to boost conversion.
highlight.zh: 藉助讓整個網站能嵌入郵件中的技術變革，Zaymo 是首個讓 Shopify 品牌製作完全互動式郵件、提升轉換率的郵件製作工具。

summary.en: An AI lip-sync tool for video content creators.
summary.zh: 為影片創作者打造的 AI 對嘴工具。

highlight.en: Built by the original team behind the open-source wav2lip, sync. aims to make video as editable as a document so creators shoot once and revise themselves instead of re-recording.
highlight.zh: 由開源 wav2lip 原始團隊打造，sync. 目標是讓影片像文件一樣可編輯，使創作者只需拍攝一次、再行修改而非重錄。

summary.en: Building the next generation of night-vision devices.
summary.zh: 打造新一代夜視裝置。

highlight.en: DeepNight is building the next generation of night vision powered by AI.
highlight.zh: DeepNight 正以 AI 打造新一代夜視技術。

summary.en: The secondary market for real estate leases.
summary.zh: 房地產租約的次級市場。

highlight.en: Ryse is the only marketplace where investors who want to buy leases can trade with real estate operators who want to sell them.
highlight.zh: Ryse 是唯一一個讓想買租約的投資人與想賣租約的房地產經營者交易的市集。

summary.en: Workflow automation built for logistics.
summary.zh: 專為物流打造的工作流程自動化。

highlight.en: Reform automates freight operations from quote to cash without replacing the trusted systems logistics teams already rely on.
highlight.zh: Reform 從報價到收款全程自動化貨運作業，且無需取代物流團隊既有信賴的系統。

summary.en: AI agents for outbound sales working by your side.
summary.zh: 在你身邊協作的外撥銷售 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Topo's AI outbound agent mimics top SDRs, trained on your knowledge base, calls, and CRM to find ready-to-buy leads via buying signals on channels like LinkedIn, G2, and GitHub.
highlight.zh: Topo 的 AI 外撥代理模擬頂尖業務開發代表，以你的知識庫、通話與 CRM 訓練，透過 LinkedIn、G2、GitHub 等管道的購買訊號找出已準備購買的潛在客戶。

summary.en: Robots to automate fulfillment.
summary.zh: 用機器人自動化倉儲揀貨。

highlight.en: Yondu is deploying humanoid robots as the first flexible, drop-in picking automation solution designed for third-party logistics providers (3PLs).
highlight.zh: Yondu 正部署人形機器人，作為首套為第三方物流業者（3PL）設計、彈性且可即插即用的揀貨自動化解決方案。

summary.en: An AI-powered supply chain compliance engine.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的供應鏈合規引擎。

highlight.en: RetailReady replaces the 100-page manuals warehouse workers reference while boxing orders with a tablet application that guides compliance steps like shipping label placement.
highlight.zh: RetailReady 以平板應用程式取代倉庫工人裝箱時參照的百頁手冊，逐步指引貼運送標籤等合規步驟。

summary.en: Building autonomous organizations without humans in the loop.
summary.zh: 打造無需人類介入的自主組織。

highlight.en: Andon Labs argues safety from humans in the loop is a mirage, so it researches and applies AI control in its own real-world deployments of autonomous organizations.
highlight.zh: Andon Labs 主張「人類介入即安全」是一種錯覺，因此在自家真實部署的自主組織中研究並落實 AI 控制。

summary.en: Automates inbound document processing workflows for hospitals.
summary.zh: 為醫院自動化進件文件處理流程。

highlight.en: StarJar automates hospital inbound documents like referrals, claim files, audit files, and medical images, processing millions a year for top U.S. healthcare systems.
highlight.zh: StarJar 自動化醫院的進件文件，如轉診單、理賠檔案、稽核檔案與醫療影像，每年為美國頂尖醫療體系處理數百萬份文件。

summary.en: A foundation model for the brain.
summary.zh: 為大腦打造的基礎模型。

highlight.en: Piramidal is building a foundation model to understand and control neural syntax.
highlight.zh: Piramidal 正打造一個用以理解並控制神經語法的基礎模型。

summary.en: A transparent, AI-powered healthcare third-party administrator (TPA).
summary.zh: 透明、以 AI 驅動的醫療第三方管理機構（TPA）。

highlight.en: TrueClaim rebuilds health plan administration from the ground up with AI-powered claims review and an API-first architecture, positioning itself as 'Shopify, but for health plans.'
highlight.zh: TrueClaim 從零重建健康保險計畫管理，採用 AI 驅動的理賠審查與 API 優先架構，自我定位為「健康保險計畫版的 Shopify」。
